title: M5: Auth types + Neo4j adapter for Auth.js — custom adapter storing User/Account/VerificationToken nodes in Neo4j, using @auth/core with JWT sessions

title: Investigation CRUD API routes
description: POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/investigations, GET /api/investigations (list), GET /api/investigations/[slug] (detail). Auth-protected write ops, public read for published.

title: TipTap editor component with toolbar
description: components/investigation/InvestigationEditor.tsx: TipTap editor with heading, bold, italic, link, image, lists, blockquote. Toolbar component. GraphNodeEmbed custom extension.

title: Investigation create/edit pages
description: /investigacion/nueva and /investigacion/[slug]/editar with title, TipTap body, tags. Auth-protected.

title: Investigation reading page
description: /investigacion/[slug] SSR with TipTap HTML, embedded graph nodes, author info, OG tags

title: Investigations index + my investigations
description: /investigaciones published grid with tag filters. /mis-investigaciones user dashboard.

title: Verify and commit query-abstraction + auth improvements
description: Verify TS compiles, commit uncommitted changes from previous iteration

title: M11 Phase 1: Create compliance types.ts with Zod schemas + TS interfaces
description: ComplianceFrameworkSchema, ComplianceRuleSchema, ChecklistItemSchema, ComplianceAttestationSchema, ComplianceEvaluationSchema + inferred TS types + CheckResult, ComplianceReport interfaces

title: M11 Phase 1: Add compliance constraints + indexes to schema.ts
description: 5 uniqueness constraints (ComplianceFramework, ComplianceRule, ChecklistItem, ComplianceAttestation, ComplianceEvaluation) + 4 range indexes

title: YAML framework definitions
description: Phase 2a — completed

title: Compliance loader: YAML parser + Zod validation + Neo4j MERGE
description: src/lib/compliance/loader.ts — reads YAML framework files, validates with Zod schemas, MERGEs Framework/Rule/ChecklistItem nodes into Neo4j

title: Seed compliance CLI script
description: scripts/seed-compliance.ts — CLI entrypoint that calls loader for all framework YAML files, adds pnpm script

description: Implement cypher check handler that runs arbitrary Cypher queries and returns violations count

title: Phase 3: property_exists check handler
description: Implement property_exists check handler

title: Phase 3: min_count check handler
description: Implement min_count check handler

title: Phase 3: tier_minimum check handler
description: Implement tier_minimum check handler

title: Phase 3: llm check handler
description: Implement LLM check handler using llamacpp provider

title: Phase 3: check handler index + dispatcher
description: Create index.ts that exports all handlers and a dispatch function mapping CheckConfig type to handler

title: M11 Phase 4: compliance engine + attestation
description: Create src/lib/compliance/engine.ts — orchestrates rule evaluation for a framework, generates ComplianceReport, resolves checklist attestation status from Neo4j

title: Phase 5: Pipeline integration — compliance gate + evaluation persistence
description: Create src/lib/compliance/pipeline.ts: runComplianceGate() for stage transitions, persistEvaluation() to save ComplianceEvaluation nodes, hook into advanceStage()

title: M11 Phase 6: Compliance API routes
description: Create compliance API routes: GET frameworks, GET evaluate/:frameworkId, GET evaluations, POST attestations

description: Set up vitest, write tests for compliance types/schemas, engine scoring logic, and API routes integration

description: Fill the empty e2e/compliance/ directory with 4 spec files testing compliance API routes and UI

title: M12: Engine E2E tests (pipeline-run, gate-review, proposals, orchestrator, snapshots)
description: Fill the empty e2e/engine/ directory with spec files testing engine API routes

description: Create e2e/fixtures/ with seed-politicians, seed-investigation, seed-compliance, seed-engine, auth, cleanup, mock-llm-server

title: M13 Phase 1: MCP Server Core — Cloudflare Worker project, SSE transport, MCP protocol, auth, registry, types
description: Create workers/mcp-server/ with wrangler.toml, SSE handler, MCP protocol (initialize, tools/list, tools/call, resources/list, resources/read), auth module, tool registry. Add MCPApiKey constraint to schema.ts. Create src/lib/mcp/types.ts with Zod schemas.

title: M13 Phase 2: Investigation + Graph tool handlers
description: Create investigation.ts (8 tools) and graph.ts (6 tools) in workers/mcp-server/src/tools/, wire up in index.ts

title: Fix iterate stage factory — stages/index.ts returns AnalyzeStageRunner for iterate case
description: Import IterateStageRunner from ./iterate, return it for the iterate case. Also fix iterate.ts STAGE_KIND from analyze to iterate.

title: Implement 5 missing LLM tool handlers in stages/shared.ts processToolCall
description: read_graph (parameterized Cypher), fetch_url (fetch+extract text), extract_entities (parse entities), run_algorithm (call algorithms.ts), compare_timelines (query+compare dates). Currently silent no-ops.

title: Fix synthesis.ts HAS_PROPOSAL relationship — either create it in proposals.ts or rewrite queries
description: orchestrator/synthesis.ts queries (ps:PipelineState)-[:HAS_PROPOSAL]->(p:Proposal) but this relationship is never written. Fix by creating relationship in createProposal or use property match.

title: Wire full dedup into ingest stage — call buildExistingMaps() and dedup()
description: ingest.ts only uses normalizeName. Wire buildExistingMaps() and fuzzy dedup() from ingestion/dedup.ts to check proposals against existing Neo4j nodes.

title: Sanitize dynamic labels in proposals.ts applyProposal — add whitelist
description: Template literals for Neo4j labels from LLM output. Add whitelist check against SchemaDefinition node types.

title: Fix EngineDashboard.tsx bootstrap — pipeline_id missing from initial fetch
description: Initial GET /engine/state has no pipeline_id param, API returns 400. Add pipeline discovery step or update route to support listing by caso_slug.

title: Fix AuditLog.tsx response parse — json.data vs json.data.entries
description: Line 93: setEntries(json.data) should be setEntries(json.data.entries) to match API response shape.

title: Add motor/engine tab to InvestigationNav.tsx
description: Add { href: /motor, label: { en: Engine, es: Motor } } to all case tab lists in InvestigationNav.

title: Fix motor page for static case routes (caso-epstein, finanzas-politicas)
description: Static route trees dont go through dynamic [slug] layout. Either add motor/page.tsx in each or migrate to dynamic layout.

title: LLM cost budgeting — accumulate token usage in iterate.ts
description: LLMResponse.usage populated but never accumulated. Add running token total per pipeline run with configurable budget ceiling.

title: Graph algorithms — add centrality, community detection, anomaly to algorithms.ts
description: Only BFS exists. Add degree centrality, betweenness centrality, community detection (label propagation), anomaly detection.

title: Engine metrics — add pipeline_runs_total, llm_calls_total, proposals_total counters
description: No observability counters. Add counter nodes or in-memory counters exposed via /engine/metrics endpoint.

title: Wire engine logger — replace console.error with createEngineLogger
description: logger.ts exists but is never imported. Replace raw console.error in pipeline.ts, stages, and orchestrator.

title: Fix TypeScript errors in scripts/ — .ts extensions and implicit any
description: 9 errors: 5 .ts extension imports (remove extensions) and 4 implicit any from indexing QueryResult in ingest-consolidation.ts.
